2604.08523.title: ClawBench: Can AI Agents Complete Everyday Online Tasks?
2604.08523.paper_summary: AI agents may be able to automate your inbox, but can they automate other routine aspects of your life? Everyday online tasks offer a realistic yet unsolved testbed for evaluating the next generation of AI agents. To this end, we introduce ClawBench, an evaluation framework of 153 simple tasks that people need to accomplish regularly in their lives and work, spanning 144 live platforms across 15 categories, from completing purchases and booking appointments to submitting job applications. These tasks require demanding capabilities beyond existing benchmarks, such as obtaining relevant information from user-provided documents, navigating multi-step workflows across diverse platforms, and write-heavy operations like filling in many detailed forms correctly. Unlike existing benchmarks that evaluate agents in offline sandboxes with static pages, ClawBench operates on production websites, preserving the full complexity, dynamic nature, and challenges of real-world web interaction. A lightweight interception layer captures and blocks only the final submission request, ensuring safe evaluation without real-world side effects. Our evaluations of 7 frontier models show that both proprietary and open-source models can complete only a small portion of these tasks. For example, Claude Sonnet 4.6 achieves only 33.3%. Progress on ClawBench brings us closer to AI agents that can function as reliable general-purpose assistants.
2604.08523.paper_summary_zh: AI 代理可能能夠自動化您的收件箱，但它們能否自動化您生活中的其他日常方面？<lb/>日常的在線任務為評估下一代 AI 代理提供了一個現實但尚未解決的測試平台。<lb/>為此，我們介紹了 ClawBench，一個評估框架，涵蓋 153 個人們在生活和工作中需要定期完成的簡單任務，跨越 15 個類別的 144 個實時平台，從完成購物和預訂約會到提交求職申請。<lb/>這些任務需要超越現有基準的高要求能力，例如從用戶提供的文件中獲取相關信息、在多個平台上導航多步工作流程，以及像正確填寫許多詳細表單這樣的重寫操作。<lb/>與現有基準在靜態頁面上評估代理的離線沙盒不同，ClawBench 在生產網站上運行，保留了現實世界網絡互動的全部複雜性、動態性和挑戰。<lb/>一個輕量級的攔截層僅捕獲並阻止最終提交請求，確保安全評估而不產生現實世界的副作用。<lb/>我們對 7 個前沿模型的評估顯示，無論是專有模型還是開源模型都只能完成這些任務的一小部分。<lb/>例如，Claude Sonnet 4.6 只達到了 33.3%。<lb/>在 ClawBench 上的進展使我們更接近能夠作為可靠通用助手運作的 AI 代理。
2604.08523.author: Yuxuan Zhang et.al.
2604.08523.authors: Yuxuan Zhang, Yubo Wang, Yipeng Zhu, Penghui Du, Junwen Miao, Xuan Lu, Wendong Xu, Yunzhuo Hao, Songcheng Cai, Xiaochen Wang, Huaisong Zhang, Xian Wu, Yi Lu, Minyi Lei, Kai Zou, Huifeng Yin, Ping Nie, Liang Chen, Dongfu Jiang, Wenhu Chen, Kelsey R. Allen
